Full Catalog
01 / 06
Water-Based
Gravure Inks
Low VOC, eco-friendly formulation ideal for food packaging and tissue printing. Compliant with major international safety standards.
Food Packaging Low VOC BOPP / PET
02 / 06
Alcohol-Based
Gravure Inks
High-speed printing performance with excellent adhesion on plastic films. Suitable for high-volume flexible packaging production.
High Speed PE / CPP Strong Adhesion
03 / 06
Composite
Lamination Inks
Designed for multi-layer laminated packaging. Superior bond strength, heat resistance, and color stability under lamination pressure.
Lamination Heat Resistant Multi-layer
04 / 06
Tissue &
Paper Inks
Specialized inks for tissue, napkin and kraft paper printing. Fast-drying with vivid color reproduction and skin-safe formulation.
Tissue Paper Skin-Safe Fast Dry
05 / 06
Surface
Printing Inks
For surface printing on PE bags, woven bags, and non-woven fabrics. Excellent rub resistance and outdoor durability.
PE Bags Rub Resistant Outdoor Use
06 / 06
Custom
OEM Formulation
Bespoke ink development for your specific substrate, press speed, and regulatory requirements. Full R&D support included.
Custom Colors R&D Support Pantone Match

Why Choose Cailo

Precision You
Can Print On

  • ⬡
    Technical R&D Lab
    In-house laboratory with advanced viscosity, adhesion, and color testing. Every batch certified before shipping.
  • ◈
    Fast Lead Times
    Standard orders fulfilled in 7–15 days. Sample dispatch within 48 hours of confirmation.
  • ◎
    Eco-Friendly Focus
    Water-based product line with low VOC, meeting environmental standards across Southeast Asia and Europe.
  • ◇
    Global Technical Support
    Dedicated technical team available for troubleshooting, press trials, and formulation adjustments.
